raw.message:
Don't Miss Out On Your Gifts!
Come Back Now And Collect Them!

hook.summary: A vibrant reward screen featuring a mountain of gold coins and a gift offer.
hook.visual_action: Gold coins shimmer in a farm setting while reward icons for power-ups appear above them.

scene_flow: Static display of a farm landscape with a massive pile of gold coins and a 'Collect Now' button.
Three specific power-up icons (infinity energy, +5 cards, wild card) pop up sequentially.
Cartoon dog characters at the bottom perform idle animations like blinking and smiling.
The entire scene remains a static call-to-action for the duration of the clip.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers, likely adults 35-65, who enjoy relaxing solitaire and farm-themed progression games.
